title: InvisibleFrames
description: The most beautiful and convenient invisible frames
body:
A simple plugin for creating invisible item frames on Paper/Spigot servers. No more dealing with out-of-place frames in your builds!

# 📦 How to use:

**Shift + Right-Click with shears** - make frame invisible

Frame rotation is locked, but possible while holding **Shift**

# ✨ Features:

- Works with regular and glow item frames
- Frame automatically hides when item is placed
- Becomes visible when empty
- Uses shears durability
- No configs needed - just install and play
